description: JBoss.org is an archived community/documentation site for JBoss application server technologies. The material found describes self-hosted server management and development guides rather than a public online service with programmatic endpoints on jboss.org.
summary: jboss.org does not expose a clearly documented public developer integration surface on jboss.org itself; available pages are archived product documentation and community content for self-hosted JBoss/WildFly management, not public APIs/GraphQL/MCP/CLI endpoints operated at jboss.org.
